header.title: API Reference & Connection
header.description: Technical specifications for tool integration and Antigravity local environment synchronization.

benefit_text: The MCP protocol allows seamless integration of local development tools (linters, generators, analyzers) into the context of AI agents, ensuring predictability and FSD compliance.

stdio.label: Local Stdio (Recommended)
stdio.text: Fastest and most stable method for development. Uses a local script via npx.

http.label: Local HTTP
http.text: Connection via HTTP to a running server on localhost. Requires mcp-remote.

remote.label: Remote (Vercel / Render)
remote.text: Using a deployed server. Note the 'warm-up' time (cold start) up to 60 seconds.

analyze_project.title: analyze_project
analyze_project.description: Analyzes project files for FSD and naming conventions compliance.

get_rules.title: get_rules
get_rules.description: Retrieves current project rules from RulesProvider.

scaffold_entity.title: scaffold_entity
scaffold_entity.description: Generates FSD entity structure (api, types, schema, converters, ui).
